name: claude-plugins-official
description: Directory of popular Claude Code extensions including development tools, productivity plugins, and MCP integrations
notes: This project-level agents/Codex copy installs the Anthropic official Claude plugin marketplace by vendoring the upstream /plugins/ tree.
Vendored /plugins/ source: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official — pinned to commit c78da81119b6295856638784432e4f85902123d6.
The vendored tree lives under .agents/plugins/claude-plugins-official/upstream/plugins/; a skills-only mirror also exists under .agents/skills/claude-plugins-official/upstream/.

Plugin manifest updated 2026-07-09 to record the vendor policy change. The previous 'record only, do not vendor' caveat (commit 97716aa) is superseded by the full vendor in the latest commit on the vendor branch.
External partner/community plugins under /external_plugins/ are not vendored here — only the bundled /plugins/ tree is.
Executable hooks under */hooks/* are vendored as unvetted third-party code. See VENDORED_FROM.md and plugin-registry.json for per-plugin hook counts and the safety note.
Claude Code installs entries with /plugin install {plugin-name}@claude-plugins-official. Pinned entries confirmed for this installation also include vercel and supabase.
